metadata.description: A collection of agent skills and plugins for development workflows

plugins.name: pixijs
plugins.description: PixiJS v8 development guide with bundled API references, code patterns, and best practices from official documentation.

plugins.name: animation-library
plugins.description: Decision-support dossier for picking a JS/TS motion or rendering library — 30 libraries (GSAP, Motion, three.js, PixiJS, Rive, Lottie, Remotion, and more) with a cross-library comparison matrix and per-library dossiers.

plugins.name: sudo-askpass
plugins.description: Help agents run sudo commands from non-interactive Linux sessions by detecting, configuring, and safely using askpass helpers.

plugins.name: design-md
plugins.description: DESIGN.md format specification from Google Labs — a self-contained plain-text representation of a design system, with tools for authoring, interpreting, and converting design tokens to Tailwind v4 @theme CSS or v3 tailwind.config.js.

plugins.name: ty-lsp
plugins.description: Astral's ty language server for Python — real-time type-checking diagnostics and code intelligence via LSP.

plugins.name: writers-room
plugins.description: Hand off a topic and get back a finished, on-brand piece (article, blog post, site copy), produced by a showrunner-led room of six editorial subagents — strategist, researcher, staff writer, line editor, skeptical reader, and distribution editor. Start with /writers-room:convene.
